answer:
NotebookLM is a source-grounded AI research assistant that is free to use with any Google account [1][2][3]. There is no standalone paid product; instead, higher usage limits and features are unlocked by subscribing to Google AI plans (Plus, Pro, or Ultra), qualifying Google Workspace editions, or enterprise Google Cloud licenses [4][1][5].

There is no public, self-serve developer API for consumer users [6][3]. Programmatic access is restricted to the NotebookLM Enterprise API, which is available only to organizations through Google Cloud via Discovery Engine v1alpha endpoints [6].
